settingsFields.name: advisorModel
settingsFields.describe: Advisor model for the server-side advisor tool.

settingsFields.name: agent
settingsFields.describe: Name of an agent (built-in or custom) to use for the main thread. Applies the agent's system prompt, tool restrictions, and model.

settingsFields.name: allowedChannelPlugins
settingsFields.describe: Teams/Enterprise allowlist of channel plugins. When set,

settingsFields.name: allowedHttpHookUrls
settingsFields.describe: Allowlist of URL patterns that HTTP hooks may target. Supports * as a wildcard (e.g. "https://hooks.example.com/*"). When set, HTTP hooks with non-matching URLs are blocked. If undefined, all URLs are allowed. If empty array, no HTTP hooks are allowed. Arrays merge across settings sources (same semantics as allowedMcpServers).

settingsFields.name: allowedMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise allowlist of MCP servers that can be used. Applies to all scopes including enterprise servers from managed-mcp.json. If undefined, all servers are allowed. If empty array, no servers are allowed. Denylist takes precedence - if a server is on both lists, it is denied.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedHooksOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only hooks from managed settings run. User, project, and local hooks are ignored.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedMcpServersOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), allowedMcpServers is only read from managed settings. deniedMcpServers still merges from all sources, so users can deny servers for themselves. Users can still add their own MCP servers, but only the admin-defined allowlist applies.

settingsFields.name: allowManagedPermissionRulesOnly
settingsFields.describe: When true (and set in managed settings), only permission rules (allow/deny/ask) from managed settings are respected. User, project, local, and CLI argument permission rules are ignored.

settingsFields.name: alwaysThinkingEnabled
settingsFields.describe: When false, thinking is disabled. When absent or true, thinking is enabled automatically for supported models.

settingsFields.name: apiKeyHelper
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that outputs authentication values

settingsFields.name: attribution
settingsFields.describe: Customize attribution text for commits and PRs. Each field defaults to the standard Claude Code attribution if not set.

settingsFields.name: autoCompactWindow
settingsFields.describe: Auto-compact window size

settingsFields.name: autoDreamEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable background memory consolidation (auto-dream). When set, overrides the server-side default.

settingsFields.name: autoMemoryDirectory
settingsFields.describe: Custom directory path for auto-memory storage. Supports ~/ prefix for home directory expansion. Ignored if set in projectSettings (checked-in .claude/settings.json) for security. When unset, defaults to ~/.claude/projects/<sanitized-cwd>/memory/.

settingsFields.name: autoMemoryEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Enable auto-memory for this project. When false, Claude will not read from or write to the auto-memory directory.

settingsFields.name: autoUpdatesChannel
settingsFields.describe: Release channel for auto-updates (latest or stable)

settingsFields.name: availableModels
settingsFields.describe: Allowlist of models that users can select. Accepts family aliases ("opus" allows any opus version), version prefixes ("opus-4-5" allows only that version), and full model IDs. If undefined, all models are available. If empty array, only the default model is available. Typically set in managed settings by enterprise administrators.

settingsFields.name: awaySummaryEnabled
settingsFields.describe: @internal When false, the session recap (shown when you return after being away for 5+ minutes) is disabled. When absent or true, recap is enabled. Hidden from public SDK types until external launch; mirrors voiceHandsfree pattern above.

settingsFields.name: awsAuthRefresh
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that refreshes AWS authentication

settingsFields.name: awsCredentialExport
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that exports AWS credentials

settingsFields.name: blockedMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise blocklist of marketplace sources. When set in managed settings, these exact sources are blocked from being added as marketplaces. The check happens BEFORE downloading, so blocked sources never touch the filesystem.

settingsFields.name: channelsEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Teams/Enterprise opt-in for channel notifications (MCP servers with the claude/channel capability pushing inbound messages). Default off. Set true to allow; users then select servers via --channels.

settingsFields.name: claudeMdExcludes
settingsFields.describe: Glob patterns or absolute paths of CLAUDE.md files to exclude from loading. Patterns are matched against absolute file paths using picomatch. Only applies to User, Project, and Local memory types (Managed/policy files cannot be excluded). Examples: "/home/user/monorepo/CLAUDE.md", "**/code/CLAUDE.md", "**/some-dir/.claude/rules/**"

settingsFields.name: cleanupPeriodDays
settingsFields.describe: Number of days to retain chat transcripts before automatic cleanup (default: 30). Minimum 1. Use a large value for long retention; use --no-session-persistence to disable transcript writes entirely.

settingsFields.name: companyAnnouncements
settingsFields.describe: Company announcements to display at startup (one will be randomly selected if multiple are provided)

settingsFields.name: defaultShell
settingsFields.describe: Default shell for input-box ! commands. Defaults to 'bash' on all platforms (no Windows auto-flip).

settingsFields.name: deniedMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise denylist of MCP servers that are explicitly blocked. If a server is on the denylist, it will be blocked across all scopes including enterprise. Denylist takes precedence over allowlist - if a server is on both lists, it is denied.

settingsFields.name: disableAllHooks
settingsFields.describe: Disable all hooks and statusLine execution

settingsFields.name: disableAutoMode
settingsFields.describe: Disable auto mode

settingsFields.name: disabledMcpjsonServers
settingsFields.describe: List of rejected MCP servers from .mcp.json

settingsFields.name: disableSkillShellExecution
settingsFields.describe: Disable inline shell execution in skills and custom slash commands from user, project, or plugin sources. Commands are replaced with a placeholder instead of being run.

settingsFields.name: effortLevel
settingsFields.describe: Persisted effort level for supported models.

settingsFields.name: enableAllProjectMcpServers
settingsFields.describe: Whether to automatically approve all MCP servers in the project

settingsFields.name: enabledMcpjsonServers
settingsFields.describe: List of approved MCP servers from .mcp.json

settingsFields.name: enabledPlugins
settingsFields.describe: Enabled plugins using plugin-id@marketplace-id format. Example: { "formatter@anthropic-tools": true }. Also supports extended format with version constraints.

settingsFields.name: env
settingsFields.describe: Environment variables to set for Claude Code sessions

settingsFields.name: extraKnownMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: Additional marketplaces to make available for this repository. Typically used in repository .claude/settings.json to ensure team members have required plugin sources.

settingsFields.name: fastMode
settingsFields.describe: When true, fast mode is enabled. When absent or false, fast mode is off.

settingsFields.name: fastModePerSessionOptIn
settingsFields.describe: When true, fast mode does not persist across sessions. Each session starts with fast mode off.

settingsFields.name: feedbackSurveyRate
settingsFields.describe: Probability (0–1) that the session quality survey appears when eligible. 0.05 is a reasonable starting point.

settingsFields.name: fileSuggestion
settingsFields.describe: Custom file suggestion configuration for @ mentions

settingsFields.name: forceLoginMethod
settingsFields.describe: Force a specific login method: "claudeai" for Claude Pro/Max, "console" for Console billing

settingsFields.name: forceLoginOrgUUID
settingsFields.describe: Organization UUID to require for OAuth login. Accepts a single UUID string or an array of UUIDs (any one is permitted). When set in managed settings, login fails if the authenticated account does not belong to a listed organization.

settingsFields.name: forceRemoteSettingsRefresh
settingsFields.describe: When set in managed settings, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails

settingsFields.name: gcpAuthRefresh
settingsFields.describe: Command to refresh GCP authentication (e.g., gcloud auth application-default login)

settingsFields.name: hooks
settingsFields.describe: Custom commands to run before/after tool executions

settingsFields.name: httpHookAllowedEnvVars
settingsFields.describe: Allowlist of environment variable names HTTP hooks may interpolate into headers. When set, each hook's effective allowedEnvVars is the intersection with this list. If undefined, no restriction is applied. Arrays merge across settings sources (same semantics as allowedMcpServers).

settingsFields.name: includeCoAuthoredBy
settingsFields.describe: Deprecated: Use attribution instead. Whether to include Claude's co-authored by attribution in commits and PRs (defaults to true)

settingsFields.name: includeGitInstructions
settingsFields.describe: Include built-in commit and PR workflow instructions in Claude's system prompt (default: true)

settingsFields.name: language
settingsFields.describe: Preferred language for Claude responses and voice dictation (e.g., "japanese", "spanish")

settingsFields.name: minimumVersion
settingsFields.describe: Minimum version to stay on - prevents downgrades when switching to stable channel

settingsFields.name: model
settingsFields.describe: Override the default model used by Claude Code

settingsFields.name: modelOverrides
settingsFields.describe: Override mapping from Anthropic model ID (e.g. "claude-opus-4-6") to provider-specific model ID (e.g. a Bedrock inference profile ARN). Typically set in managed settings by enterprise administrators.

settingsFields.name: otelHeadersHelper
settingsFields.describe: Path to a script that outputs OpenTelemetry headers

settingsFields.name: outputStyle
settingsFields.describe: Controls the output style for assistant responses

settingsFields.name: permissions
settingsFields.describe: Tool usage permissions configuration

settingsFields.name: plansDirectory
settingsFields.describe: Custom directory for plan files, relative to project root. If not set, defaults to ~/.claude/plans/

settingsFields.name: pluginConfigs
settingsFields.describe: Per-plugin configuration including MCP server user configs, keyed by plugin ID (plugin@marketplace format)

settingsFields.name: pluginTrustMessage
settingsFields.describe: Custom message to append to the plugin trust warning shown before installation. Only read from policy settings (managed-settings.json / MDM). Useful for enterprise administrators to add organization-specific context (e.g., "All plugins from our internal marketplace are vetted and approved.").

settingsFields.name: prefersReducedMotion
settingsFields.describe: Reduce or disable animations for accessibility (spinner shimmer, flash effects, etc.)

settingsFields.name: promptSuggestionEnabled
settingsFields.describe: When false, prompt suggestions are disabled. When absent or true, prompt suggestions are enabled.

settingsFields.name: proxyAuthHelper
settingsFields.describe: Shell command that outputs a Proxy-Authorization header value (EAP)

settingsFields.name: remote
settingsFields.describe: Remote session configuration

settingsFields.name: respectGitignore
settingsFields.describe: Whether file picker should respect .gitignore files (default: true). Note: .ignore files are always respected.

settingsFields.name: sandbox
settingsFields.describe: (validator: dF7())

settingsFields.name: schema
settingsFields.describe: JSON Schema reference for Claude Code settings

settingsFields.name: showClearContextOnPlanAccept
settingsFields.describe: When true, the plan-approval dialog offers a "clear context" option. Defaults to false.

settingsFields.name: showThinkingSummaries
settingsFields.describe: Show thinking summaries in the transcript view (ctrl+o). Default: false.

settingsFields.name: skillListingBudgetFraction
settingsFields.describe: Fraction of the context window (in characters) reserved for the skill listing sent to Claude (default: 0.01 = 1%). When the listing exceeds this, descriptions are shortened to fit. Raise to opt in to higher per-turn context cost.

settingsFields.name: skillListingMaxDescChars
settingsFields.describe: Per-skill description character cap in the skill listing sent to Claude (default: 1536). Descriptions longer than this are truncated. Raise to opt in to higher per-turn context cost.

settingsFields.name: skillOverrides
settingsFields.describe: Per-skill listing overrides keyed by skill name. "name-only" lists the skill without its description; "user-invocable-only" hides it from the model but keeps /name; "off" hides it from both. Absent = on.

settingsFields.name: skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt
settingsFields.describe: Whether the user has accepted the bypass permissions mode dialog

settingsFields.name: skipWebFetchPreflight
settingsFields.describe: Skip the WebFetch blocklist check for enterprise environments with restrictive security policies

settingsFields.name: spinnerTipsEnabled
settingsFields.describe: Whether to show tips in the spinner

settingsFields.name: spinnerTipsOverride
settingsFields.describe: Override spinner tips. tips: array of tip strings. excludeDefault: if true, only show custom tips (default: false).

settingsFields.name: spinnerVerbs
settingsFields.describe: Customize spinner verbs. mode: "append" adds verbs to defaults, "replace" uses only your verbs.

settingsFields.name: sshConfigs
settingsFields.describe: SSH connection configurations for remote environments. Typically set in managed settings by enterprise administrators to pre-configure SSH connections for team members.

settingsFields.name: statusLine
settingsFields.describe: Custom status line display configuration

settingsFields.name: strictKnownMarketplaces
settingsFields.describe: Enterprise strict list of allowed marketplace sources. When set in managed settings, ONLY these exact sources can be added as marketplaces. The check happens BEFORE downloading, so blocked sources never touch the filesystem.

settingsFields.name: subagentStatusLine
settingsFields.describe: Custom per-subagent status line shown in the agent panel; receives row context as JSON on stdin

settingsFields.name: syntaxHighlightingDisabled
settingsFields.describe: Whether to disable syntax highlighting in diffs

settingsFields.name: terminalTitleFromRename
settingsFields.describe: Whether /rename updates the terminal tab title (defaults to true). Set to false to keep auto-generated topic titles.

settingsFields.name: tui
settingsFields.describe: Terminal UI renderer. "fullscreen" uses the flicker-free alt-screen renderer with virtualized scrollback (equivalent to CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1). "default" uses the classic main-screen renderer.

settingsFields.name: viewMode
settingsFields.describe: Default transcript view mode on startup

settingsFields.name: voice
settingsFields.describe: @internal Voice handsfree settings; behavior gated at read sites by feature(VOICE_HANDSFREE). Hidden from public SDK types until external launch; see TODO on voiceEnabled in entitlements.ts.

settingsFields.name: worktree
settingsFields.describe: Git worktree configuration for --worktree flag.

globalFields.name: agentPushNotifEnabled
globalFields.describe: Allow Claude to push to your mobile device when it deems it appropriate (requires Remote Control)

globalFields.name: autoScrollEnabled
globalFields.describe: Auto-scroll conversation to bottom (fullscreen mode only)

globalFields.name: fileCheckpointingEnabled
globalFields.describe: Enable file checkpointing for code rewind

globalFields.name: inputNeededNotifEnabled
globalFields.describe: Push to your mobile device when a permission prompt or question is waiting (requires Remote Control)

globalFields.name: language
globalFields.describe: Preferred language for Claude responses and voice dictation (e.g.,

globalFields.name: remoteControlAtStartup
globalFields.describe: Enable Remote Control for all sessions (true | false | default)

globalFields.name: showTurnDuration
globalFields.describe: Show turn duration message after responses (e.g.,

globalFields.name: terminalProgressBarEnabled
globalFields.describe: Show OSC 9;4 progress indicator in supported terminals
